verification.lint: pass with zero warnings or errors
verification.axe: no serious or critical violations in final tested surfaces

implemented_system_ownership.desk: weekly decision, urgent work, and live academy briefs
implemented_system_ownership.reports: brief, case, risk, review, conviction, and accountability
implemented_system_ownership.world: geography, access, conditions, rivals, assignments, and world history
implemented_system_ownership.career: appointment, security, employer need, progression, authority, and runway
implemented_system_ownership.agency: commercial posture, capacity, concentration, quality debt, and reputation exposure

remaining_recommendations.title: Complete manual accessibility certification
remaining_recommendations.acceptance: NVDA, VoiceOver, 200% zoom, keyboard-only, and packaged Electron focus journeys pass

remaining_recommendations.title: Expand portrait and venue variety
remaining_recommendations.acceptance: A three-season career avoids obvious visual repetition for unrelated people and markets

remaining_recommendations.title: Run first-hour comprehension studies
remaining_recommendations.acceptance: At least 8 of 10 mixed-experience players explain and complete the evidence-to-consequence loop unaided

remaining_recommendations.title: Protect perceived startup performance
remaining_recommendations.acceptance: Packaged target hardware reaches an interactive Desk quickly and never appears frozen

final_judgment: The Youth Scout core is cohesive and release-worthy from a design-system perspective; the next value is content breadth, release proof, performance, and telemetry rather than structural redesign.
